title: Park Cleanup Volunteer
description: Join us for a monthly park cleanup. Gloves and bags provided.

title: Soup Kitchen Helper
description: Help prepare and serve meals at our community shelter every Tuesday evening.

title: Online Coding Mentor
description: Mentor students remotely via video calls. 2 hours per week commitment.

title: Tree Planting Crew
description: Help plant native trees in urban areas. Physical work, outdoor setting.

title: Donation Sorting Volunteer
description: Sort and organize clothing donations. Flexible hours.

title: Remote Translation Volunteer
description: Translate educational materials from English to Croatian. Work from home.
